title: Protected Concerted Activity — NLRB Case Examples
description: NLRB interactive, case-by-case compendium of enforcement outcomes involving employees' Section 7 right to engage in protected concerted activity (PCA) under the NLRA — cases across construction, hospitality, retail, and social media, illustrating when employee actions (group complaints, workplace discussions, social-media posts, work stoppages) do and do not qualify for protection.
update_cadence: Ad hoc (agency-maintained; cases added over time)
notes: CONSUMPTION HAZARD: large file (~50 KB); head sampled. Contains an interactive map of case locations; outcomes vary (settlements and ALJ/Board decisions). Useful as precedent illustration, not a definitive legal index.
